title: Opening for Medical Officer at Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd!
